place: ORLA, Dorchester Collection, Palm Jumeirah, Dubai, UAE
title: Luna Sky Palace at ORLA, Dorchester Collection
blurb: A 58,470 sq ft tri-level sky palace atop ORLA, Dorchester Collection on Palm Jumeirah — a wellness spa, double-height living, a private ten-car gallery and a 36-metre rooftop infinity pool with a sky garden.
detail:
Crafted by visionaries, for visionaries, Luna Sky Palace is a 58,470 sq ft palace on Dubai's world-renowned Palm Jumeirah. Complete with an exclusive wellness spa, sumptuous double-height living spaces and a private ten-car gallery, it extends over three levels — culminating in a breathtaking sky-garden rooftop with an entertainment zone, sunset lounge, jacuzzi and an awe-inspiring 36-metre infinity pool.

A grand arrival experience awaits on the lobby level, with direct lift access, valet parking, a private basement lounge and lobby lounge with a private office for assistants. The grand hall opens to living, dining and bar areas plus a formal living room with double-height ceilings, all framed by floor-to-ceiling windows capturing the beach, sea and Dubai skyline. The master suite is a haven of luxury with his & hers walk-in closets, while the upper level holds a family living and media room and a sophisticated home office.

As a residence of ORLA, Dorchester Collection — a beachfront masterpiece by OMNIYAT — owners enjoy a resident-only beach club, two private cinemas, cigar lounges, a fitness suite, indoor children's areas, a bowling alley and entertainment lounges. Part of the OMNIYAT Bespoke collection, Luna Sky Palace sets a new standard for life on the Palm.
